judge.reason: Primary purpose is to clone the skb, allocate a forw_packet, set up delayed work, and queue the broadcast packet for later transmission. The refcount operations (skb_clone, kfree_skb on error, and internal refcount management in batadv_forw_packet_alloc) are incidental error-handling steps within broader queuing logic.
